name: BRC Group Holdings, Inc.
summary: Overview BRC Group Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RILY) (the Company or BRCGH), which changed its name from B. Riley Financial, Inc. effective January 1, 2026, is a diversified holding company offering a platform of businesses, including financial services (with complementary banking and wealth management businesses), telecom, retail, and investments in equity, debt and venture capital.
